Space.name: Rocket Lab USA
Space.note: Drugi po SpaceX gracz w small-launch + rozwój rakiety Neutron (medium-lift). Pionowo zintegrowany space prime — launch + satellites + components. Moonshot na komercjalizację LEO.

Energy.name: Centrus Energy
Energy.note: Jedyny US enrichmer HALEU z aktywną NRC license. $1.87B cash, $3.8B backlog, $900M DOE contract. Wide moat — 4-5 lat przewagi nad General Matter. AI hyperscalers (Amazon/Google) = nowy popyt poza government.

Energy.name: Cameco Corporation
Energy.note: Tier-1 uranium miner (Cigar Lake) + 49% Westinghouse stake = optionality na AP300 SMR. Świetna spółka, ale drogo: cena $122 vs FV $80 (-34%). Watch dla pullbacku do $90.

Energy.name: Oklo Inc.
Energy.note: Vertically integrated nuclear utility — Aurora SMR (sodium fast reactor, HALEU). 14 GW customer pipeline (Meta 1.2GW, F-35 Eielson, Equinix 500MW, NVIDIA partnership). Build-own-operate PPA model = utility-like recurring revenue. 20-letni reload cycle = wysokie capacity factor >95% i niższy LCOE $40-60/MWh. Pre-revenue do 2028, ale Atomic Alchemy isotopes może dać first revenue już 2026.
